overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a foggy coastal settlement at night. The player approaches a massive crashed aerial structure, ascends concrete stairs beneath a neon-lit overpass, and emerges onto an open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and illuminated by a distant red searchlight beam.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path between ruined buildings toward a massive crashed structure in the distance

wide concrete staircase leading upward between buildings
derelict buildings with broken facades lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy coastal path at night, flanked by ruined residential buildings. The camera moves forward toward a massive crashed structure visible through the haze ahead, with palm trees silhouetted against the dark sky and a single street lamp providing warm illumination.

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs between close walls, approaching the top where neon lights become visible

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase enclosed by high walls, transitioning from the open coastal path to a more confined space. Neon lights from the structure above become visible as the camera climbs toward the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under concrete overpass with neon strip lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass, passing neon light strips and emerging toward an open waterfront area

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with rectangular support pillars and glowing neon strips
horizontal white neon tube lights mounted on the concrete ceiling
bright red spotlight beam cutting through the fog and haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass illuminated by horizontal neon strips. As the camera moves forward, a dramatic red searchlight beam becomes visible through the fog on the right, while the crashed structure shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees and distant searchlight

events.description: exits covered overpass into open waterfront promenade
encounter group of NPCs gathered near a light source on the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront path, passing NPCs and approaching the red searchlight area

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting and standing near a barrel fire or light source
individual walking along the path in the same direction

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade
green and orange vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and a metal railing. The red searchlight beam dominates the right side of the sky as the camera approaches a group of NPCs gathered near a light source, then continues past a vending machine toward the distant illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy, ruined coastal path toward an open, neon-lit waterfront promenade. It begins by moving through a hazy night landscape flanked by ruined residential buildings and silhouetted palm trees, heading toward the looming shape of a massive crashed structure. As the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase enclosed by high walls, the open path gives way to a confined space where neon lights from above begin to flicker into view. The scene then shifts beneath a massive concrete overpass illuminated by horizontal neon strips, where a dramatic red searchlight beam pierces through the fog on the right. Finally, the camera emerges onto a wide promenade lined with palm trees and metal railings, passing a vending machine and a group of NPCs while moving toward the distant red glow of the searchlight.
